title: ArcFlow Runtime Contract Specification v0.1
description: Draft RCS v0.1 — Week 2. Formal APPROVED sign-off is Week 3.

Uuid.description: RFC 4122 identifier. Used on all entity ids and trace correlation.

DateTimeUtc.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp on envelopes and trace events.

MessageType.description: Envelope dispatch label. Sprint 2+ all SDK traffic.

ExecutionStatus.description: Workflow or step lifecycle state. Sprint 2 execution, Sprint 5 traces.

ErrorCode.description: Stable machine-readable error code in ErrorPayload. Sprint 7+ error handling.

MemoryType.description: Memory backend kind on AgentDefinition. Sprint 4 memory subsystem.

TraceEventKind.description: Observability event classification. Sprint 5 tracing engine.

ProviderId.description: LLM provider identifier on ProviderConfig. Sprint 6 providers.
